creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Opening https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/nautilus-sendto shows the following banner:

  Project 'GNOME/nautilus-sendto' was moved to 'Archive/nautilus-sendto'.
  Please update any links and bookmarks that may still have the old path.

  Archived project! Repository and other project resources are read-only
